content: Hi, I'm Ezra and I'm an Indie Game Developer. I just got back from a trip to Japan and I'm still on a high from all the amazing experiences I had.
Welcome back, Ezra! Japan is an incredible country. What were some of your favorite experiences from your trip?
Definitely the hiking in the Japanese Alps and trying all the local foods, like sushi and ramen. I also visited my friend, Kenji, in Tokyo and we had a blast exploring the city together.
That sounds amazing! I've heard great things about the Japanese Alps. Did you try any new outdoor activities while you were traveling?
Actually, yes! I tried mountain biking for the first time in a small town in rural Japan. It was such a unique experience and I ended up buying a mountain bike to try it out back home in Portland.
That's so cool! I've never met anyone who's into mountain biking before. Are you planning on doing any more hiking or biking trips in the near future?
Yes, I'm actually planning a trip to the Rockies with my wife, Yumi, to do some hiking and biking. We're thinking of going in August or September, depending on our schedules.
The Rockies are a beautiful range. Have you and Yumi traveled together before?
Yes, we've taken a few trips together, including a road trip out to Yellowstone last year. We had a blast and I'm sure we'll have a great time on this trip too.
That sounds like a lot of fun. What do you like to do to relax and unwind after a long day of work on your games?
I actually really enjoy doing woodworking and making furniture in my spare time. It's a great way to relieve stress and be creative.
That's really cool! I wouldn't have guessed that you're into woodworking. Do you have any upcoming projects or games that you're working on?
Yeah, I'm actually working on a new game that's set in a fantasy world. It's still in the early stages, but I'm really excited about it.

That sounds like a lot of fun. I'm sure it'll be a great game. It was great chatting with you about your travels and hobbies. If you have any more questions or need any recommendations, feel free to ask.
Thanks, I will! It was great talking to you too. I'm looking forward to my next adventure and working on my new game.
You're welcome! It was a pleasure chatting with you. Have a great day and happy travels!
You too, thanks again for the chat! I'm off to plan my next trip and work on my game.
